lessons.title: Sous Vide Cooking
lessons.description: Learn the sous vide technique for perfect cooking results.
steps: Set the sous vide machine to the desired temperature.
Finish with a sear on a hot pan.

lessons.title: Fermentation Basics
lessons.description: Understand the basics of fermentation and how to apply it in cooking.
steps: Submerge the ingredients in the brine.
Seal and store in a cool, dark place for a few days to weeks.
